claims.statement: formatBytes returns bytes + " B" when bytes is less than 1024.
formatBytes formats larger byte values with one decimal place and a unit from KB, MB, GB, or TB.

entities.name: formatBytes
entities.description: Function that formats a byte count as a human-readable string.

entities.name: format
entities.description: String.format call used for output formatting.

relations.description: formatBytes calls format to produce the final string.
